title: Polybotrya teijsmannianum

The classification of Polybotrya teijsmannianum is within the genus Polybotrya, which is a group of ferns that are characterized by their unique frond structure. The species is further classified as a member of the order Polypodiales, which includes a wide range of ferns. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and phylogenetic relationships with other fern species.
